display_name.description: Name assigned to the API key for identification purposes; must be unique within the project.

name.description: The display name of the API key, must be unique within the project.

restrictions.description: Defines the usage restrictions for the API key, such as allowed referrers, IP addresses, or API services.
restrictions.type: list(object({android_key_restrictions: list(object({allowed_applications: list(object({package_name: string,sha1_fingerprint: string}))})),api_targets: list(object({methods: optional(list(string)),service: string})),browser_key_restrictions: list(object({allowed_referrers: list(string)})),ios_key_restrictions: list(object({allowed_bundle_ids: list(string)})),server_key_restrictions: list(object({allowed_ips: list(string)}))}))

service_account_email.description: Email of the service account used to authenticate API key operations.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration settings for creating, updating, or deleting the API key, allowing customization of operation time limits.
